evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Ensuring data quality and compliance with data governance standards; Building modern data platforms and establishing technical foundations
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality, governance, and foundational work dominate over speed—role emphasizes reliable infrastructure for data-driven decisions.
evidence.domain_risk: Collaborating with business units to identify data-driven optimization opportunities; large datasets from various source systems
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Role supports business optimization decisions at organizational scale without explicit regulatory or financial reporting language.
evidence.data_team_maturity: building modern data platforms and establishing technical foundations; Developing and operating modern data platforms
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: JD frames the role as foundational infrastructure work ('establishing technical foundations'), suggesting early-stage platform development.
evidence.jd_authorship: Designing, implementing, and optimizing ETL/ELT pipelines using Databricks; Modeling, integrating, and processing large datasets; Ensuring data quality and compliance with data governance standards
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tool context (Databricks, ETL/ELT, Power BI) and precise technical responsibilities show hiring manager detail about actual platform work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Creating analysis and reporting solutions with Power BI; Collaborating with business units; supporting cloud architecture implementation
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary focus is on building and maintaining data platform infrastructure, with business units as consumers of analytical outputs.
evidence.autonomy_level: Designing, implementing, and optimizing ETL/ELT pipelines; Ensuring data quality and compliance; Evaluating new technologies in data engineering, analytics, and AI
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role owns platform design and quality standards while collaborating with business units for optimization opportunities—mixed strategic technical ownership with execution for business.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: "Evaluating new technologies in data engineering, analytics, and AI" is a vague, team-level phrase with no specific candidate responsibility to build or use AI, so it falls back to none.
evidence.testing_framing: Ensuring data quality and compliance with data governance standards
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and compliance are framed as owned responsibilities, not just tools or practices to be familiar with.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Ensuring data quality and compliance with data governance standards; Establishing technical foundations for data-driven decisions
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High emphasis on reliability, compliance, and governance—fear is bad data and non-compliance affecting organizational decisions.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: building modern data platforms and establishing technical foundations for data-driven decisions; Developing and operating modern data platforms
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Language emphasizes 'building' and 'establishing' new infrastructure rather than maintaining or scaling existing systems.
evidence.language_gate: Excellent German and English language skills required
evidence.urgency: Immediately available; Start Date: Immediately available
evidence.loss_aversion: Ensuring data quality and compliance with data governance standards. Role emphasizes governance and compliance as foundational platform requirements.
